subcodes.first_line: O Rustam-i-Dastan! Though the mighty Tahamtan was a tamer of lions, yet by the strength of his arm his desire was not attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم دستان تهمتن هر چند شیرگیر بود ولی بقوت بازو آرزو حاصل نگشت زیرا عاقبت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation
